---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ComputerIntent
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternatives you've considered.

## Path

- [ ] **Fast Path** — deterministic, no LLM/MCP (DOM, accessibility, keyboard, API calls)
- [ ] **Slow Path** — optional LLM/MCP integration (disabled by default)
- [ ] **Tooling/CLI** — developer experience, debugging, or benchmark infrastructure
- [ ] **Documentation** — guides, architecture docs, or examples

## Impact

Describe how this benefits the project's mission: deterministic, verifiable computer actions.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
